summary: Iteration 57: Search Command Palette and Dashboard Categorization tested. All features working correctly. Search palette opens via click or Cmd+K, shows 60 results grouped by 8 categories with colored headers, filters correctly, keyboard navigation works, Enter/click navigates and closes palette, Escape/click-outside closes. Dashboard has 5 categorized quick action sections (Today, Practice, Divination, Sanctuary, Explore) with 29 action buttons total.

issues: React key warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key Hold4' - minor issue in Breathing page, does not affect functionality (same as iteration 56)

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: React key warning for 'Hold4' in Breathing page persists from iteration 56

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all search palette and dashboard categorization features verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 57 complete. Search Command Palette verified: (1) Desktop nav has search button with ⌘K keyboard hint. (2) Mobile nav has search icon button. (3) Clicking search button or pressing Cmd+K/Ctrl+K opens search palette overlay. (4) Search palette shows 60 results grouped by 8 categories (Today, Practice, Divination, Sanctuary, Nourish, Explore, Sage, Profile). (5) Category headers have correct colors (Today=yellow, Practice=purple, Divination=pink, Sanctuary=teal, Nourish=green, Explore=orange, Sage=blue, Profile=purple). (6) Typing filters results correctly (meditation=4 results, yoga=1, zen=1). (7) Gibberish shows 'No results' message. (8) Arrow keys navigate up/down through results. (9) Enter key navigates to highlighted result and closes palette. (10) Escape key closes palette. (11) Clicking outside search card closes palette. (12) Footer shows result count and keyboard hints (Navigate, Open). Dashboard Categorization verified: (13) Dashboard has 'Explore & Practice' section header. (14) 5 category sections with colored headers (Today, Practice, Divination, Sanctuary, Explore). (15) 29 total action buttons across categories. (16) Action buttons navigate to correct pages on click. (17) Navigation still works (mega-menu dropdowns, Sage link, profile dropdown).
